items.notes: Polymer bearings (iglide®, igubal®, xiros®), PRT slewing rings, linear guides, and cable carriers are the most directly UXV-applicable product lines.

evidence.snippet: Our igus specialist motors offer special solutions for demanding environments and applications. With various protection classes, these motors are ideal for use in damp, dusty or challenging conditions.
Browse our selection of modular gear box systems, worm gear joints, strain wave gears, planetary gear boxes, and more.

items.notes: DC, stepper, and BLDC motors plus gearboxes are sold for industrial actuators; not specifically marketed for UXV propulsion.

products_categories.notes: igus products span 50+ industries; UXV relevance is incidental. An autonomous USV (Echodrone) case study confirms component use in unmanned vessels.

igus inc headquarters is located at 257 Ferris Ave, Rumford, RI 02916. igus enjoyneering center is located at 2055 Franklin Rd, Bloomfield Twp, MI 48302

headquarters.notes: Global parent igus SE & Co. KG is headquartered in Cologne, Germany. US subsidiary (igus inc.) is at 257 Ferris Ave, Rumford, RI 02916.

evidence.snippet: In 72 countries and more than 50 industries, motion plastics make our customers everyday life easier and improve their applications.

With the help of igus® components, Art Robotics developed a customised solution for the use of the Echodrone in the Port of Antwerp-Bruges. This solution consists of high-quality chainflex® cables and the drylin® E DC motor.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: No UXV-specific product line. General-purpose polymer motion components used incidentally in unmanned systems. The single UXV-adjacent case study shows component supply to a third-party unmanned surface vessel.

items.name: dryve D1 motor controller

evidence.snippet: dryve supports various motor types, including DC, EC and stepper motors, in both open loop and closed loop operation. The high supply voltage of up to 48 V ensures high motor speeds.

tagline: German polymer-motion specialist producing lubrication-free bearings, cable carriers, flexible cables, linear actuators, and compact gearboxes for industrial robotics and automation. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown. Strong production-ready portfolio across mechanical subsystems and propulsion; limited public evidence of direct unmanned-systems integration or defense-sector adoption.
